definition: as; in the capacity of; acting as

definition: Being four times as long, as big or as many of something.
definitions: Being four times as long, as big or as many of something.

definition: A swampy, soggy area of ground.
definitions: A swampy, soggy area of ground.

definition: To waste away; to fade, to wither.

definition: An instance of a subjective, conscious experience.

definition: The act or process of qualifying for a position, achievement etc.
definitions: The act or process of qualifying for a position, achievement etc.

definition: Meeting the standards, requirements, and training for a position.
definitions: Meeting the standards, requirements, and training for a position.

definition: To describe or characterize something by listing its qualities.
definitions: To describe or characterize something by listing its qualities.

definition: The kind, condition, and/or the set of characteristics of something, as opposed to the quantity of something.

definition: A fundamental, generic term used when referring to the measurement (count, amount) of a scalar, vector, number of items or to some other way of denominating the value of a collection or group of items.
definitions: A fundamental, generic term used when referring to the measurement (count, amount) of a scalar, vector, number of items or to some other way of denominating the value of a collection or group of items.

definition: The total amount of something; quantity.
definitions: The total amount of something; quantity.

definition: A dispute or heated argument (especially one that is verbal).
definitions: A dispute or heated argument (especially one that is verbal).

definition: Argumentative; fond of or prone to quarreling.
definitions: Argumentative; fond of or prone to quarreling.

definition: A site for mining stone, such as limestone, or slate.
definitions: A site for mining stone, such as limestone, or slate.

definition: A unit of liquid capacity equal to two pints; one-fourth (quarter) of a gallon. Equivalent to 1.136 liters in the UK and 0.946 liter (liquid quart) or 1.101 liters (dry quart) in the U.S.

definition: Of base four; using only four unique digits.
definitions: Of base four; using only four unique digits.

definition: Occurring once every quarter year (three months); taking place quarter-yearly.
definitions: Occurring once every quarter year (three months); taking place quarter-yearly.
(of a coat of arms) Divided into four parts crosswise.

definition: A quarter or district of an urban settlement in France.
definitions: A quarter or district of an urban settlement in France.

definition: A size of paper (7.5"-10" x 10"-12.5" or 190-254 x 254-312 mm). Formed by folding and cutting one of several standard sizes of paper (15"-20" x 20"-25" or 381-508 x 508-635 mm) twice to form 4 leaves (eight sides).
definitions: A size of paper (7.5"-10" x 10"-12.5" or 190-254 x 254-312 mm). Formed by folding and cutting one of several standard sizes of paper (15"-20" x 20"-25" or 381-508 x 508-635 mm) twice to form 4 leaves (eight sides).
Quarto writing paper (10 inches x 8 inches)

definition: The most abundant mineral on the earth's surface, of chemical composition silicon dioxide, SiO₂. It occurs in a variety of forms, both crystalline and amorphous. Found in every environment.
definitions: The most abundant mineral on the earth's surface, of chemical composition silicon dioxide, SiO₂. It occurs in a variety of forms, both crystalline and amorphous. Found in every environment.

definition: Resembling or having a likeness to the named thing.
definitions: Resembling or having a likeness to the named thing.

definition: A card, die, or domino with four spots or pips.

definitions: To satisfy, especially a literal or figurative thirst.

definition: A question, an inquiry (US), an enquiry (UK).
definitions: A question, an inquiry (US), an enquiry (UK).

definitions: Ellipsis of chile con queso: melted cheese, used for instance as a dipping sauce.

definitions: A journey or effort in pursuit of a goal (often lengthy, ambitious, or fervent); a mission.

definitions: A worded or expressed sentence, phrase, or only a word on its own, which asks for information, a reply, or a response; an interrogative.

definition: A line of people, vehicles or other objects, usually one to be dealt with in sequence (i.e., the one at the front end is dealt with first, the one behind is dealt with next, and so on), and which newcomers join at the opposite end (the back).

definition: Moving with speed, rapidity or swiftness, or capable of doing so; rapid; fast.
definitions: Moving with speed, rapidity or swiftness, or capable of doing so; rapid; fast.

definition: Rapidly; with speed; fast; with expedition.
definitions: Rapidly; with speed; fast; with expedition.

definitions: With little or no sound; free of disturbing noise.

definition: Absence of sound; silence or hush.

definitions: A bed covering consisting of two layers of fabric stitched together, with insulation between, often having a decorative design.

definitions: The pear-shaped fruit of a small tree of the rose family, Cydonia oblonga.

definitions: A proportional part or share; the share or proportion assigned to each in a division.
